narrative:
Tallmadge 4-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,128 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
